8.reason: This reads only up to the first space, so the entire expression is not captured. Use gets() or fgets() to read the whole line including spaces.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  This reads only up to the first space, so the entire expression is not captured. Use gets() or fgets() to read the whole line including spaces.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  This reads only up to the first space, so the entire expression is not read. Use gets() or fgets() instead.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  使用scanf("%s")不能读取包含空格的字符串，只能读取到第一个空格前，导致表达式不完整，只读取了"10"。应使用gets(s)或fgets()。
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: scanf with %s stops at the first space, so the entire input line is not read. Should use gets(s) or fgets(s, sizeof(s), stdin) to read the whole line including spaces.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  The input format allows spaces, but scanf("%s") stops reading at the first space. This causes the program to only read the first token (e.g., "10") instead of the whole expression. It should use fgets or gets to read the entire line.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  The input format allows spaces, but scanf("%s") stops reading at the first space. This causes the program to only read the first token (e.g., "10") instead of the entire expression. It should use fgets or gets to read the whole line.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Using scanf with %s stops reading at the first whitespace, so it cannot read the full expression which contains spaces. This causes only "10" to be read from "10 + 20 * 30 - 40 / 5 =", leading to wrong output.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Using scanf with %s stops at the first whitespace, so it only reads "10" from "10 + 20 * 30 - 40 / 5 =", causing the rest of the expression to be ignored.]
